JavaScript test scripts for JerryScript covering strings, types, objects, keywords, syntax, and operations.

## Folders
- **[06](06/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for string handling, type differences, object creation, closures, and Unicode comparison.
- **[07](07/README.md)**: Tests for JavaScript reserved keywords, regex matching, and syntax parsing in JerryScript.
- **[08](08/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for undefined variables, null type checks, boolean assertions, string operations, number conversions, and prototype inheritance.
- **[10](10/README.md)**: Test script for verifying the sum of two variables equals 30.
- **[11](11/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for object properties, operators, arithmetic, comparisons, and logical operations.
- **[12](12/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for assertions, loops, logic, object properties, and exception handling.
- **[13](13/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for function behavior, object properties, variable conflicts, and argument handling.
- **[15](15/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for objects, functions, arrays, strings, Booleans, numbers, and Math functions.

## Files
- **[minimal-profile-list](minimal-profile-list.md)**: JavaScript test files for the JerryScript engine's minimal profile.
